chapter_title.en: Chapter on Performing Umrah in the Month of Ramadan, Rajab, and Other Months

text: 2951 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا أَحْرَمْتَ وَ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ رَجَبٍ يَوْمٌ وَ لَيْلَةٌ فَعُمْرَتُكَ رَجَبِيَّةٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2951 - In a narration from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"If you enter Ihram with one day and night remaining in the month of Rajab, your Umrah will be considered a Rajabi Umrah."
